student_input: My FSc marks are 550/1100 and NET is 98/200. I want to apply to NUST.

state.student_input: My FSc marks are 550/1100 and NET is 98/200. I want to apply to NUST.
state.advice: Although your calculated merit score of 49.25% is a good effort, unfortunately, you do not meet the eligibility criteria for admission to NUST at this time. To improve your chances, consider focusing on enhancing your FSC and NET scores, as they are crucial components of the merit formula, with weights of 25% and 75% respectively. Since your FSC score is 550 out of 1100 and your NET score is 98 out of 200, identifying areas for improvement in these exams could significantly impact your merit score. Keep working hard and exploring opportunities to boost your scores, and you may become a more competitive candidate in the future.
